---
title: "One Strain Many Compounds Approach for Anti- textitTrypanosoma cruzi Compounds: Empowering the Marine Bacterium textitMetabacillus indicus"
date: 2025-05-01
author:
  - name: Andrade, Beatriz A.
  - name: Dos Santos, Augusto L.
  - name: Ferreira, Dayana A. S.
  - name: Abiuzi, Mariana B.
  - name: Vieira, Daniel P.
  - name: Gonçalves, Marina M.
  - name: Lago, João Henrique G.
  - name: Sartorelli, Patricia
  - name: Tempone, Andre G.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "ACS Omega"
  doi: "10.1021/acsomega.4c10784"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">One Strain Many Compounds Approach for Anti- textitTrypanosoma cruzi Compounds: Empowering the Marine Bacterium textitMetabacillus indicus</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
